meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenes.name: Team wants to standardize motion across the product.
scenes.trigger_signal: Team wants to standardize motion across the product.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Team wants to standardize motion across the product.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Start with an audit of existing animations, extract common patterns, define 3-5 values per token scale, build one primitive as proof of concept, then expand.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: Developer writes a one-off animation when a primitive exists.
scenes.trigger_signal: Developer writes a one-off animation when a primitive exists.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Developer writes a one-off animation when a primitive exists.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Check if the existing primitive can cover the use case or needs a variant. If a new pattern is genuinely needed, add it to the system — don't allow bypass.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: Designer specifies animation that cannot be built as a token.
scenes.trigger_signal: Designer specifies animation that cannot be built as a token.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Designer specifies animation that cannot be built as a token.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Translate the designer's intent into the token system: identify the semantic purpose, map to existing duration and easing scales, and prototype together.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: Need to measure motion system adoption.
scenes.trigger_signal: Need to measure motion system adoption.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Need to measure motion system adoption.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Run lint rules to count raw animation values vs. token references. Track per-component adoption rate. Focus migration effort on the 20% of components driving 80% of animation code.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.
